spec_match.rationale: Compares <script type=speculationrules> vs HTTP Speculation-Rules header under varying CSPs — the spec's two surfaces.

interactive.rationale: CSP picker drives live verdicts for both surfaces.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises pick-a-CSP and watch each surface verdict; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Simulator only; no real fetch issued so the verdicts are computed, not observed.

openQuestions.title: Wire a real fetch to verify the verdict
openQuestions.detail: Add a server route that returns the header with the chosen CSP and have the page fetch it. The visitor sees the real Chrome behaviour, not a simulation.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 1 follow-up question(s) remain.
